summary: bulk: refuse sleep/turbo/auto on non-fan devices instead of sending a no-op windmode/windtype frame.
reason: windmode/windtype are fan firmware fields; heaters, purifiers, humidifiers, and ACs accept the WebSocket frame but ignore it, so the command reported success while doing nothing. partitionForAction now filters non-fans for fan-only actions and errors out when no fan-applicable devices remain.
